query: CHP olağanüstü kurultay çağrı heyeti Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi başvuru karar - latest status as of late June / early July 2026. Has Özgür Özel's team filed the application under Civil Code Art 75 requesting appointment of a 3-person çağrı heyeti to convene a CHP extraordinary congress? Has any court issued a decision?
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the summary of findings on the CHP extraordinary congress "çağrı heyeti" court application:

## Direct Answers

**1. Has Özel's team filed the Art. 75 çağrı heyeti application?**
They **announced and prepared** to file it (target date **29 June 2026**), and many outlets reported "Özel's team goes to court today." **However, the filing was deferred.** Özel's legal advisor **Gül Çiftçi** told Odatv: *"Some technical matters concerning the congress are forming. Because that stage has not been reached, we will not file an application yet."* So the formal application was **not confirmed as completed/filed** in the latest available reporting.

**2. Has any court issued a decision?**
**No.** No Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi has ruled on appointing a 3-person call committee (since the filing wasn't completed). Related judicial paths went **against** Özel: on **26 June 2026**, an istinaf court **rejected** a related "kararın açıklanması" (clarification-of-decision) application, with additional appellate rejections reported.

## Key Timeline
- **21 May 2026** — Ankara appellate court's "mutlak butlan" decision removes Özel, reinstates Kılıçdaroğlu
- **17 June 2026** — 833 notarized signatures delivered to CHP HQ (admin counted 820 valid)
- **26 June 2026** — bylaws deadline expires; appellate rejection of related application
- **29 June 2026** — çağrı heyeti application announced but **deferred** (Gül Çiftçi)
- **2 July 2026** — Özel camp pivots to "new party" talks at Parliament
- **9 July 2026** — MP Bülbül floats forming a ~100-MP new party from 21 July if Yargıtay rules against Özel

**Bottom line:** As of late June/early July 2026, the application was announced but reportedly not formally completed, no call-committee court decision exists, and the crisis has shifted toward an anticipated **Yargıtay ruling (~21 July 2026)** and new-party contingency planning. Structured findings have been recorded.

sources.title: İstinaf mahkemesinden Özgür Özel'e kötü haber: CHP'de kurultay başvurusuna bir ret daha
sources.snippet: Appellate court delivered another rejection of a CHP congress-related application.

key_facts: The 21 May 2026 Ankara Regional Court of Appeals (36th Civil Chamber) 'mutlak butlan' (absolute nullity) decision removed Özgür Özel and reinstated Kemal Kılıçdaroğlu as CHP chairman, triggering the crisis.

Özel's camp collected 833 notarized delegate signatures for an extraordinary congress (delivered to CHP HQ ~17 June 2026); Kılıçdaroğlu administration counted only 820 as valid after disciplinary referrals/withdrawals.
Under CHP bylaws, the administration had a deadline (~26 June 2026) to convene the congress; failure would let Özel's team seek a court-appointed 'çağrı heyeti' (call committee).
The Art. 75 çağrı heyeti application was announced for 29 June 2026, with reports that if accepted CHP would hold an extraordinary congress within at most 45 days.
The application was NOT confirmed as filed: Özel's legal advisor Gül Çiftçi (Odatv) said 'we will not file an application yet' due to unresolved technical matters — the filing was deferred.
NO court has issued a decision appointing a 3-person çağrı heyeti as of early July 2026.
On 26 June 2026 an istinaf (appellate) court rejected a related 'kararın açıklanması' (clarification of decision) application by the Özel side.
By 2 July 2026 Özel's camp shifted toward 'new party' scenarios, holding a ~2.5-hour meeting at Parliament (3 candidate party names reported).
On 9 July 2026 CHP MP Süleyman Bülbül said they could launch a new party with ~100 MPs from 21 July 2026 if the Yargıtay rules against Özel.
The decisive pending judicial event is an anticipated Yargıtay (Court of Cassation) decision around 21 July 2026 on the mutlak butlan case.

data_points.metric: Notarized delegate signatures collected by Özel camp for extraordinary congress
Valid delegate signatures per Kılıçdaroğlu administration count
Maximum days to hold extraordinary congress if court appoints çağrı heyeti
MPs Özel camp says could form new party from 21 July 2026 if Yargıtay rules against Özel
